source_depth_status: source-backed draft; expert review and deeper figure review still recommended before mature publication

sources.title: Lacunar Stroke - StatPearls - NCBI Bookshelf
sources.notes: Textbook-style clinical context source. Used for lacunar stroke definition, syndrome framing, risk factors, and treatment-context cautions.

sources.title: Neuroimaging standards for research into small vessel disease and its contribution to ageing and neurodegeneration (STRIVE-1)
sources.notes: Used for lacune definition discipline and the distinction between lacunes, recent small subcortical infarcts, white matter hyperintensities, microbleeds, perivascular spaces, and atrophy.

sources.title: Neuroimaging standards for research into small vessel disease - advances since 2013 (STRIVE-2)
sources.notes: Used to keep terminology aligned with updated small-vessel-disease neuroimaging standards and to avoid overclaiming mechanism from morphology alone.

sources.title: Mechanisms underlying sporadic cerebral small vessel disease: insights from neuroimaging
sources.notes: Used for imaging feature language: rounded/ovoid/tubular lesions, DWI hyperintensity, ADC reduction, T2/FLAIR hyperintensity, T1 hypointensity, and chronic cavity-like lacunes.

sources.title: CNS small vessel disease: A clinical review
sources.notes: Used to connect lacunar infarct with CSVD biomarkers and MR-RATE contrasts such as microbleeds, atrophy, gliosis/WMH-like labels, and chronic small-vessel disease burden.

sources.title: Neuroimaging in cerebral small vessel disease: Update and new concepts
sources.notes: Used for how lacunar infarct sits within a broader SVD imaging phenotype and why longitudinal imaging and coexisting biomarkers matter for cohorts.

sources.title: Lacunar infarct - Radiopaedia
sources.notes: Used as radiology-facing reference for common locations and concise imaging appearance. Treat as a supporting reference, not the sole authority.

sources.title: ACR Appropriateness Criteria: Cerebrovascular Diseases-Stroke and Stroke-Related Conditions
sources.notes: Used for modality and pathway context, especially why DWI/ADC, CT, CTA/MRA, and clinical timing affect interpretation.

sources.title: ESO Guideline on covert cerebral small vessel disease
sources.notes: Guideline context for covert small vessel disease, WMH, lacunes, outcomes, and research trial design.

sources.title: Stroke and Its Mimics: Diagnosis and Treatment - Diseases of the Brain, Head and Neck, Spine 2024-2027
sources.notes: Useful for stroke mimics and imaging workflow around small acute infarcts.

sources.title: Ischemic Stroke - StatPearls - NCBI Bookshelf
sources.notes: Use for broader ischemic stroke subtype hierarchy and small-vessel occlusion criteria.

sources.title: Neuroanatomy, Internal Capsule - StatPearls - NCBI Bookshelf
sources.notes: Supports internal capsule location, perforator supply, and classic lacunar syndrome context.

sources.title: The Radiology Assistant: Vascular territories of the Brain - Lacunar Infarcts
sources.notes: Concise radiology teaching for lacunar infarcts, thalamic example, and Virchow-Robin space mimic.

sources.title: Lacunar stroke - Stroke Manual
sources.notes: Updated clinician-facing lacunar stroke page; use as practical reference, not primary authority.

sources.title: Pathophysiology of Lacunar Stroke: History's Mysteries and Modern Interpretations
sources.notes: Broad lacunar stroke pathophysiology review connecting Fisher, lipohyalinosis, biomarkers, and modern imaging.

sources.title: Advances in Lacunar Stroke Pathophysiology: A Review
sources.notes: Use for mechanism heterogeneity and why not all small deep infarcts are the same etiology.

sources.title: Branch Atheromatous Plaque: A Major Cause of Lacunar Infarction (High-Resolution MRI Study)
sources.notes: Narrow but valuable for parent-artery plaque and pontine/deep perforator mechanism differentiation.

sources.title: Are morphologic features of recent small subcortical infarcts related to specific etiologic aspects?
sources.notes: Provides DWI/FLAIR examples by thalamus, internal capsule, pons, centrum semiovale, and tubular RSSI morphology.

sources.title: Variation in risk factors for recent small subcortical infarcts with infarct size, shape, and location
sources.notes: Supports size, shape, and location heterogeneity in recent small subcortical infarcts.

sources.title: Symptoms and probabilistic anatomical mapping of lacunar infarcts
sources.notes: Supports DWI-defined acute lacunar infarct localization and symptom mapping.

sources.title: Imaging perivascular space structure and function using brain MRI
sources.notes: Includes a useful table contrasting PVS, WMH, and lacunes.

sources.title: Enlarged Perivascular Spaces and Age-Related Clinical Diseases
sources.notes: Supports lacune versus enlarged perivascular space comparison including size, location, shape, symmetry, and FLAIR rim.

sources.title: Perivascular Spaces, Glymphatic System and MR
sources.notes: Supports PVS MRI appearance and how FLAIR/DWI/ADC help distinguish PVS from lacunes and WMH.

sources.title: Heterogeneity of small vessel disease: a systematic review of MRI and histopathology correlations
sources.notes: Useful for histopathology correlation of MRI-defined lacunes and small-vessel disease markers.

sources.title: Small Vessel Disease, a Marker of Brain Health: What the Radiologist Needs to Know
sources.notes: Radiologist-focused review; full text may require journal access.

sources.title: Achieved Blood Pressures in the Secondary Prevention of Small Subcortical Strokes (SPS3) Study
sources.notes: Use for BP-target trial context in MRI-confirmed recent lacunar stroke; not patient-specific instructions.

sources.title: Predictors of mortality in patients with lacunar stroke in the Secondary Prevention of Small Subcortical Strokes trial
sources.notes: Supports mortality covariate and endpoint context in MRI-defined lacunar stroke cohorts.

sources.title: Predictors of stroke recurrence in patients with recent lacunar stroke and response to interventions according to risk status
sources.notes: Supports recurrence-risk covariates and stratification; keep intervention statements scoped to research context.

sources.title: Recurrent vascular events in lacunar stroke patients with metabolic syndrome and/or diabetes
sources.notes: Supports diabetes/metabolic syndrome as important lacunar-stroke cohort covariates.

sources.title: Microbleeds in the SPS3 Trial: Stroke, Mortality and Treatment Interactions
sources.notes: Supports microbleeds as coexisting marker and risk/safety covariate in lacunar stroke cohorts.

sources.title: Cerebral Small Vessel Disease: A Review Focusing on Pathophysiology, Biomarkers, and Machine Learning Strategies
sources.notes: Useful for lacunes, small subcortical infarcts, WMH, perivascular spaces, microbleeds, and ML strategy context.

sources.title: Incident cerebral lacunes: A review
sources.notes: Use for longitudinal lacune formation and progression framing; full access may vary.

sources.title: Lacunar Stroke: Overview of Lacunes, Classification of Ischemic Strokes, Formation of Lacunes
sources.notes: Use as practical clinical reference; not a primary guideline.

sources.title: Functional, Cognitive, Physical, and Vascular Outcomes 9 Years After Lacunar and Mild Cortical Ischemic Stroke
sources.notes: Recent long-term outcome evidence comparing lacunar and mild cortical ischemic stroke.

sources.title: Recurrent lacunar infarction following a previous lacunar stroke: a clinical study of 122 patients
sources.notes: Older but useful recurrence cohort; interpret with era and registry limitations.

sources.title: A quantitative systematic review of domain-specific cognitive impairment in lacunar stroke
sources.notes: Supports cognitive domain endpoint framing after lacunar stroke.

sources.title: Long-term mortality and recurrent vascular events in lacunar versus non-lacunar ischaemic stroke: A cohort study
sources.notes: Useful for comparing lacunar/SVD ischemic stroke with other ischemic stroke subtypes.

sources.title: Cognitive Impairment after Lacunar Stroke and the Risk of Recurrent Stroke and Death
sources.notes: Supports cognitive impairment as prognostic variable in lacunar stroke cohorts.

sources.title: Cognitive impairment after lacunar stroke: systematic review and meta-analysis of incidence, prevalence and comparison with other stroke subtypes
sources.notes: Broad support for cognitive outcome endpoints and comparison with other stroke subtypes.

sources.title: Outcome in lacunar stroke: A cohort study
sources.notes: Use for outcome covariate context; full article access may vary.

sources.title: Risk factors and outcome of patients with symptomatic intracranial stenosis presenting with lacunar stroke
sources.notes: Supports distinguishing lacunar-appearing presentation caused by intracranial stenosis from classic small-vessel lacunar disease.

sources.title: Five-year Prognosis after Mild to Moderate Ischemic Stroke by Stroke Subtype: A Multi-Clinic Registry Study
sources.notes: Use for long-term event and death context by lacunar versus nonlacunar stroke subtype.

sources.title: MRI-visible perivascular spaces: relationship to cognition and small vessel disease MRI markers in ischaemic stroke and TIA
sources.notes: Supports PVS definitions and differentiation from lacunes in stroke/TIA MRI cohorts.

sources.title: An MRI Based Ischemic Stroke Classification - A Mechanism Oriented Approach
sources.notes: Supports BAD and lacunar mechanism distinctions using MRI lesion pattern.

sources.title: Lacunar Infarcts, but Not Perivascular Spaces, Are Predictors of Cognitive Decline in Cerebral Small-Vessel Disease
sources.notes: Supports lacune/PVS distinction and cognitive outcome implications.

sources.title: Perfusion Status in Lacunar Stroke: A Pathophysiological Issue
sources.notes: Supports perfusion context and STRIVE terminology for RSSI and lacunes.

sources.title: Cerebral small vessel disease: Capillary pathways to stroke and cognitive decline
sources.notes: Use for capillary dysfunction and small-vessel pathophysiology context; not imaging-specific enough for primary appearance claims.

sources.title: Advances in Cerebral Small Vessel Disease: Sandra E. Black Lecture to the Canadian Neurological Sciences Federation
sources.notes: Recent broad review of CSVD manifestations, imaging, and research directions.

sources.title: Blood pressure at age 40 and key features of cerebral small vessel disease at age 70: data from the ACE 1950 Study
sources.notes: Recent risk-factor source for midlife blood pressure and later MRI CSVD markers.

sources.title: Treatment Approaches to Lacunar Stroke
sources.notes: Use for research-context treatment and figure support; full text/rights require review.
